Package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model

package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model
Contains classes representing the entities stored in DynamoDB
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb
    The dynamodb package contains packages and classes supporting integration of IZ Gateway Hub with DynamoDB as it's back end database.
    gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.repository
    Contains the classes necessary to support a repository of objects in a DynamoDB table.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AccessControl
    Supports Access Controls with a set of Access Control Entries
    AccessControl.Map
    Provides easy access to the Map class for Swagger documentation
    AccessGroup
    DynamoDB entity for AccessGroup, representing an access control group record.
    AllowedUser
    DynamoDB entity for AllowedUser, representing a user allowed to send to a destination.
    CertificateStatus
    This class records status of a given certificate wrt to OCSP checks
    DenyListRecord
    DynamoDB entity for DenyListRecord, representing a user denied access to IZ Gateway.
    Destination
    A Destination stored in a Dynamo Database
    EndpointStatus
    This class reports on the status of a destination at a given point in time.
    EndpointStatus.Map
    Map of statushistory entities reported by /statushistory API
    Event
    Supports Event Tracking
    Event.Map
    Provides easy access to the Map class for Swagger documentation
    FileType
    DynamoDB entity for FileType, representing a file type record.
    Jurisdiction
    An entity to get jurisdiction information
    Jurisdiction.Map
    A map of jurisdictions.
    MessageHeader
    Message header captures information associated with message header values including the destination identifier, the jurisdiction, and the type of sender.
    MessageHeader.Map
    An alias for the message header map supporting Swagger documentation of this resource.
    OrganizationRecord
    DynamoDB entity for OrganizationRecord, representing an organization record with principal names and audit info.
